response:
**Basic Salad Ingredients**

- [ ] Romaine or iceberg lettuce (chopped)  
- [ ] Mixed greens (baby spinach, arugula, etc.)  
- [ ] Cherry tomatoes (halved)  
- [ ] Cucumber (sliced)  
- [ ] Red onion (thinly sliced)  
- [ ] Bell pepper (any color, diced)  
- [ ] Shredded carrots  
- [ ] Feta or goat cheese (crumbled)  
- [ ] Sliced olives (kalamata, black, or green)  
- [ ] Sunflower seeds or toasted walnuts (optional)  
- [ ] Fresh herbs (parsley, dill, basil – roughly chopped)  
- [ ] Olive oil (extra‑virgin)  
- [ ] Lemon juice or red wine vinegar  
- [ ] Dijon mustard (optional, for emulsification)  
- [ ] Salt and freshly ground black pepper  

Feel free to mix and match based on your taste—just tick the items you’d like to include and enjoy your fresh, customizable salad!
